articles.title: Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto
articles.description: All parties are still optimistic that Clarity can happen before the midterms, but time is really starting to run out.

articles.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
articles.description: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

articles.title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
articles.description: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

articles.title: Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban
articles.description: U.S.-linked wallets traded $571 million in political contracts over the past year, more than any other country, even though the platform legally cannot serve them. The money leans toward the foreign-conflict markets U.S. venues do not list.

articles.title: Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how
articles.description: Financial institutions are racing to become the secure gateways for stablecoins as digital asset volume is projected to explode by 2030.

articles.title: Collateral, not yield, will decide which stablecoins win
articles.description: As yield-bearing stablecoins race toward a $50 billion market capitalization, the industry is optimizing for the wrong metric, argues Artem Tolkachev, chief RWA officer at Falcon Finance.

articles.title: Kalshi and prediction market sector embroiled in mixed bag of legal fights across U.S.
articles.description: Some of the many battles with state gaming regulators aren't going well for the industry at the moment, but it isn't without its would-be government protectors.

articles.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
articles.description: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

articles.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
articles.description: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

articles.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
articles.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy said he will hold bitcoin all the way down to zero after buying near $100,000.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
articles.description: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

articles.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
articles.description: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

articles.title: Tokenization's next use case is personalized portfolios, NYLIM executive says
articles.description: Thomas Sy, head of multi-asset solutions at the $800-million asset manager, says blockchain can enable complex portfolio construction that's not yet possible in traditional finance.

articles.title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
articles.description: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

articles.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
articles.description: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

articles.title: Bitcoin experts split over plan to freeze Satoshi's 1.1 million bitcoin as quantum threat grows
articles.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao said Satoshi Nakamoto's bitcoin should be frozen before quantum computers can steal it. Not everyone agrees.

articles.title: How ethical hackers with just a $3,000 server found a flaw that could've put $70 billion in crypto at risk
articles.description: A critical flaw in the Aptos blockchain, which was patched, gave researchers a near-90% success rate at breaking a core security guarantee, with attack costs of just hundreds of dollars.

articles.title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
articles.description: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

articles.title: Kalshi June trading volume tops $9B as World Cup fuels prediction markets
articles.description: Kalshi posted a record month for trading volume as the expanded FIFA World Cup boosted prediction market activity, DefiLlama data shows.

articles.title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
articles.description: Andy Konwinski used Anthropic's Fable 5 debacle as exhibit A in the case against letting a handful of private labs govern who gets to do AI research.

articles.title: Why bitcoin's disconnect from record-high stocks won't last

articles.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows

articles.title: Europe led on crypto regulation. Now implementation must match ambition
EU moves to block retail investors from explosive boom of multibillion-dollar prediction markets
articles.description: The region's regulators emphasized that a product's actual function as a derivative matters more than its commercial name or labeling when assessing compliance.

articles.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal

articles.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns

articles.title: Tim Draper says Arkham got Bitcoin wallet attribution ‘wrong’

articles.title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
articles.description: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.

articles.title: Bitcoin’s next parabolic run may need $1 trillion in fresh capital
articles.description: This cycle, about $697 billion in new money has generated a roughly 689% gain, compared with earlier cycles where far less capital drove returns of upto 50,000%.

articles.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low

articles.title: US law enforcement group drops opposition to CLARITY Act: Report
articles.description: The Major County Sheriffs of America said it still wants the CLARITY Act amended to give local law enforcement more resources to investigate illicit finance cases.

articles.title: Bitcoin, Ether extend relief rallies as extreme fear meets renewed ETF buying

articles.title: SOL rallies as Solana memecoins, prediction market activity surge: Are bulls back?

articles.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins
